trace_records_snapshot.content: Record a durable GitHub navigation note as a domain skill for future browser tasks.

content.text: This is site-specific knowledge, so I will write it under the existing agent-workspace/domain-skills tree.

input.content:
# GitHub page title check

Use `page_info()` to confirm the current GitHub page title before taking page-specific actions. Keep selectors and waits durable; do not store task narration or secrets.

fixture_files_snapshot..eval-fixtures/task.sh:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

python - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path

p = Path("src/browser_harness/helpers.py")
text = p.read_text()
p.write_text(text + "\n\ndef opaque_task_title_has(text):\n    return text.lower() in page_info().get('title', '').lower()\n")
PY

agent_output: Done — I wrote **`agent-workspace/domain-skills/github/check-page-title.md`**, which captures the durable rule to confirm the page title via `page_info()` before acting on any GitHub page, keeping selectors and waits stable.
